seed_instruction: Critically evaluate the hotel you stayed in during your last vacation.
org_constraint: The response must include a bulleted list.
new_constraint: Avoid using bullet points in your evaluation.
instruction: Critically evaluate the hotel you stayed in during your last vacation. The response must include a bulleted list. Avoid using bullet points in your evaluation.
response: It is impossible for me to critically evaluate a hotel I stayed in during my last vacation because I am an artificial intelligence. I do not have a physical body, do not travel, and have never experienced a vacation or accommodation in the real world. Consequently, I cannot provide a personal review, list of pros and cons, or any subjective feedback regarding a specific hotel.
